component.name: Moraine
component.summary: Snapshot backups over SSH and rclone

description.p: Moraine is a small, fast backup client written in Rust with a native GTK desktop app and a scriptable command line — same engine, same config.

Hard-linked snapshots over SSH make every run look like a complete tree, but only what changed takes new space. Restore anything, from any snapshot. An rclone backend adds cloud/object storage and FTP targets.

ul.li: Schedules installed into cron, retention/pruning, and a restore browser

screenshot.caption: Quick Backup — pick a target and run a snapshot backup

description.p: Desktop notifications when a backup finishes — a normal one on success, a critical one on failure (so a failed scheduled run doesn't go unnoticed).
The update notification now downloads the new release in the background with a progress bar and hands it to the system installer.
System-tray icon, in-app update check, and a window icon fix.
Autostart launches minimized to the taskbar; portable asset paths for Flatpak/Snap/AppImage.
